nodes.name: Grey-hooded sierra finch

nodes.name: Grey-hooded sierra finch
nodes.summary: The grey-hooded sierra finch (Phrygilus gayi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina and Chile where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
